textByHashes.b40aae606585846ec640a4a1dc15eddf21b06603: Water, water get your fresh water here, 1000 coins a waterskin, a bargain in these difficult times.
textByHashes.121fc0cabfba7880226363c66b6b4214b74d2d09: Well it's the cheapest water you'll find in this town.
textByHashes.f0bfe5f67cfa9d8f1e1a3a2a8f6d8f2ea845f5ca: Yes the people round here can't seem to get the water themselves. It's an ideal business opportunity for one such as myself.
textByHashes.3db624322ee37e8f7765768776fa525116f94214: I don't see it like that. Without me they'd be in even more of a mess. I'm doing them a favour and in true Pollnivneachian spirit making a profit along the way.
textByHashes.b0c7c976ac0f735804f8e87833ec765b42a62512: Business here really seems to have dried up. I had a good thing going here and you spoiled it.
textByHashes.ad81dd5f4e87778f6a09d8fdf5b842cd43f1cdc9: So want to buy some water?
textByHashes.96803a037fe516e5001e52a13885d72ff1cf8163: To you 1000 coins for a waterskin!
textByHashes.c913de30cca24ee0676f337b3421b9dd25a9621c: If you want water you need to buy it off me.
